## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy, branding guidelines, and workflow optimization for Siit's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy to focus on vertical-specific thought leadership pieces with supporting articles and programmatic SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Brand awareness is a key priority; need to balance top-of-funnel content with action-driven pieces](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Explore non-blog content formats and ways to capture founders' voices in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential to develop workflow templates as a unique content offering](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and Vertical Approach

  - [Proposed strategy: Parent thought leadership article for each vertical, with supporting cluster articles](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Programmatic SEO opportunities identified for scalable content creation](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Recommendation to go across verticals rather than focusing on one at a time](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Posting schedule: Start with 5 articles/week, ramp up to 10, then 20; monitor SEO traction](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Brand Guidelines and Image Creation

  - [Current AI-generated images feel off-brand](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Carmel to consult with designer for brand-aligned image guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Team to prioritize loading content and agenda items before calls (Mon/Tues) for timely review](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

### Content Types and Distribution

  - [Explore non-blog content formats (e.g., glossary, rich SEO content)](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Discuss strategy for sharing blog content on social media](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Consider supplementing founders' content creation with GrowthX's assistance](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Workflow Templates as Unique Content

  - [Idea to create templates for Siit's workflow automation features](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Potential to develop 50+ templates for various use cases (e.g., onboarding, password reset)](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Explore programmatic identification of customer-generated use cases](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)

### Brand Awareness and Trust Building

  - [High demo-to-customer conversion rate (70%+) and low churn indicate strong product-market fit](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Main focus: Increasing brand awareness and building trust](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Customer concern: Siit being a small startup managing critical IT workflows](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to review content strategy with Shalom and provide thumbs up](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Team to send 20 article recommendations by Friday for the following week's content](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Explore creative solutions for capturing founders' voices in content](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Investigate non-blog content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Carmel to share brand guidelines in the morning](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Team to deliver last two articles by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/K_4UJ4sPq4tK2dG7skzZyLPCxHm5GEMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1638.0)
